alternative_parents.description: Inorganic compounds of sulfur with a less electronegative element.
alternative_parents.name: Inorganic sulfides

alternative_parents.description: Inorganic compounds consisting of an assembly of cations and anions.
alternative_parents.name: Inorganic salts

class.description: Inorganic compounds belonging either to the alkali metal hydrides, the alkali metal nitrides, the alkali metal oxides, or the alkali metal sulfides.
class.name: Alkali metal organides

description: This compound belongs to the class of inorganic compounds known as alkali metal sulfides. These are inorganic compounds containing a sulfur atom of an oxidation state of -2, in which the heaviest atom bonded to the oxygen is an alkali metal.

direct_parent.description: Inorganic compounds containing a sulfur atom of an oxidation state of -2, in which the heaviest atom bonded to the oxygen is an alkali metal.
direct_parent.name: Alkali metal sulfides

kingdom.description: Compounds that do not contain a C atom. Exceptions are made for isocyanide/cyanide and their non-hydrocarbyl derivatives, thiophosgene, carbon diselenide, carbon monosulfide, carbon disulfide, carbon subsulfide, carbon monoxide, carbon trioxide, carbon suboxide, and dicarbon monoxide.
kingdom.name: Inorganic compounds

subclass.description: Inorganic compounds containing a sulfur atom of an oxidation state of -2, in which the heaviest atom bonded to the oxygen is an alkali metal.
subclass.name: Alkali metal sulfides

superclass.description: Compounds that contains both metal and non metal atoms.
superclass.name: Mixed metal/non-metal compounds
